name: multi-line always block with source range
description: Code should include an always block that spans multiple lines with begin-end delimiters

name: multi-line if-else statement with source range
description: Code should include an if-else statement whose branches span multiple lines

name: multi-line module declaration with port list
description: Code should include a module declaration with a port list that spans multiple lines

name: multi-line always_comb block with source range
description: Code should include an always_comb block that spans multiple lines with begin-end delimiters

name: multi-line case statement with source range
description: Code should include a case statement with multiple case items spanning multiple lines

name: multi-line struct type definition with source range
description: Code should include a packed or unpacked struct definition that spans multiple lines

name: multi-line generate block with source range
description: Code should include a generate block that spans multiple lines with begin-end delimiters
snippet:
generate
  for (genvar i = 0; i < N; i++) begin : gen_loop
    assign out[i] = in[i];
  end
endgenerate

name: single-line assignment with column source range
description: Code should include a continuous or procedural assignment on a single line to exercise start-to-end column ranges
